name: Paris Hi-Way
description_short: Port of Houston Warehouse FCU is a member-owned credit union serving port employees with NCUA-insured savings accounts, loans, and online banking services.
description_long:
Port of Houston Warehouse FCU operates as a federally-chartered credit union based in Houston, Texas, serving employees of the Port of Houston. The credit union was established to provide financial services specifically tailored to port workers, emphasizing accessibility and ease of banking for members who work demanding jobs. The organization maintains its headquarters at 1717 Turning Basin Drive in Houston and operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance protection.

The credit union offers core financial services including savings accounts, loans (specific types not detailed on their website), and rate products. Members have access to online home banking with secure login credentials, telephone banking through a dedicated line, and traditional branch services. The institution provides member resources and educational materials on security and privacy matters, reflecting standard credit union service offerings.

Port of Houston Warehouse FCU distinguishes itself by focusing exclusively on Port of Houston employees, creating a specialized member base with shared employment context. The tagline "Bank With Someone That Knows Port Employees" positions the credit union as understanding the unique financial needs of dock and warehouse workers. The organization emphasizes ease, speed, and security in their service delivery approach.

The website provides limited detail about specific loan products, rates, fees, or membership requirements beyond the employee affiliation. While NCUA insurance coverage up to $250,000 is highlighted, the institution does not disclose competitive rate information, loan terms, or comprehensive service details online. This lack of transparency may require prospective members to contact the credit union directly for detailed product information.
services: Savings accounts with NCUA insurance protection
Online home banking with secure member login
Account access through member number and PIN authentication
pros: NCUA insurance coverage protecting savings up to at least $250,000
Specialized credit union serving Port of Houston employees with industry-specific expertise
Online home banking available with multi-factor security (member number, SSN, password, security questions)
Telephone banking option through dedicated line (800-860-5565) for remote account access
Established local presence in Houston with physical branch location
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure returning earnings to members rather than shareholders
Federal credit union status ensuring regulatory oversight and consumer protections
cons: Website lacks specific information about loan types, terms, APRs, or availability
Membership appears restricted to Port of Houston employees, limiting accessibility
No rate information published online for savings products or loans
Limited online service details; many features require contacting the credit union directly
Outdated website design and copyright (2018) may indicate limited digital investment
best_for: Port of Houston dock, warehouse, and maritime employees seeking member-owned banking
Port workers wanting banking services from an institution familiar with their industry and employment situation
Individuals prioritizing NCUA insurance protection and credit union membership benefits
diagnosis: Port of Houston Warehouse FCU is best suited for Port of Houston employees seeking traditional credit union banking with NCUA insurance protection from an institution familiar with maritime industry employment. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, or terms—interested parties must contact the credit union directly for comprehensive details about loans, savings rates, and membership eligibility beyond the apparent Port of Houston employment requirement.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
